special_mechanics.name: Golf Shot Power Meter
special_mechanics.description: Player times button press to stop marker at desired point on power meter to determine shot power

special_mechanics.name: Shot Spin Control
special_mechanics.description: Second button press determines shot spin characteristics

special_mechanics.name: Environmental Effects
special_mechanics.description: Wind and ball spin affect trajectory and distance

tier_notes: Tier 3 - This is a golf sports game, not a platformer/action game. No character movement physics, gravity, or jump mechanics documented. Game mechanics focus on golf club selection, power meter timing, and environmental factors (wind, spin). Movement parameters are not applicable to golf gameplay.
